prompt.content: You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested tasks using the available tools. Do not ask clarifying questions - use the information provided and make reasonable assumptions when needed.

Review our HelpScout conversations for knowledge base improvement signals. When agents had to provide detailed explanations that should be documented, create Jira issues in the DOCS project. Flag conversations that mention outdated documentation. Log findings to the KB tracker (ss_kb, ws_findings) and post a summary to #docs-team. Include the Batch_Reference from ws_config in the summary.Include the names of affected entities in your message(s).

conversations.subject: How to set up SAML SSO with Okta

threads.body: How do I configure SAML SSO with Okta? I couldn't find any documentation.

Great question! Here's a step-by-step guide since we don't have this documented yet:

1. Go to Okta Admin > Applications > Add Application
2. Select 'SAML 2.0' as the sign-on method
3. Set the Single Sign-On URL to https://app.example.com/sso/callback
4. Set the Audience URI to https://app.example.com
5. Under Attribute Statements, add: email -> user.email, name -> user.displayName
6. Download the metadata XML
7. In our app, go to Settings > Security > SSO and upload the metadata

We should really add this to our docs.

conversations.subject: API v2 docs show wrong endpoint

threads.body: The docs at docs.example.com/api/v2/users say to use POST /api/v2/users/create but that endpoint returns 404. The actual endpoint is POST /api/v2/users.
You're absolutely right - the documentation is outdated. The correct endpoint is POST /api/v2/users. We changed this in v2.3 but the docs weren't updated.
Our webhooks are failing about 30% of the time. How do we debug this?

Here's a comprehensive troubleshooting guide for webhook failures:

1. Check the webhook delivery log at Settings > Webhooks > Delivery Log
2. Look for HTTP status codes - 4xx means your endpoint rejected it, 5xx means your server had an error
3. Common causes: Timeout (must respond within 30s), SSL issues, Payload size over 256KB
4. To test: Use our webhook tester at Settings > Webhooks > Test Delivery
5. Enable retry mode: Settings > Webhooks > Advanced > Enable Auto-Retry
Where do I find my API key?
Settings > API > Keys. Docs: docs.example.com/api/authentication
Your rate limit documentation says 100 requests per minute, but we're throttled at 60. The docs say one thing but the actual behavior is different.
The docs are outdated. We lowered the default to 60/min in January. Documentation hasn't been updated yet.
My account is locked.
Unlocked. You had 5 failed attempts.
Reports showing PST instead of EST.
Corrected your timezone to EST.
Team - here's the rollback procedure for internal reference.
Updated escalation matrix.

conversations.subject: How to create custom fields for contacts

threads.body: I need custom fields for contacts. Couldn't find instructions in docs.

Here's how to set up custom fields:

1. Navigate to Settings > Data Model > Custom Fields
2. Click 'Add Custom Field'
3. Choose field type (Text, Number, Date, Dropdown)
4. Set name and optional description
5. Under 'Visibility', choose which roles can see/edit
6. For dropdowns, add options in 'Values'
7. Click Save

Needs Admin permissions. This should be in our docs.
How do I reset my password?
Click 'Forgot Password'. Full docs: docs.example.com/password-reset
How do webhooks work?
Docs: docs.example.com/webhooks
